{{CargoOrgan
|name=Venomous Tongue
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10875
|idx=82
|description=A highly elastic, venom-laced tongue once belonged to a dimension-hopping archangel slayer, an Angel T9 player. Later sold to a wealthy collector with... intense curiosity. After prolonged use far beyond combat standards, the tongue vanished — presumed to have escaped.
|skill=
|hp=2970
|def=169
|atk=163
|rush=216
|gene1=Chance of Breaking Enemy +3%
|gene2=Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +6%
|gene3=Snail Arena, chance to paralyze enemy +3%
|gene4=Zombie Minion Cloning SPD +3%
|gene5=Snail Arena, enemy Lifesteal Rate -30%
|gene7=Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +6% (Awakened)
|}}
